prompt: Review a solid NlQueryWorkflow component refactoring plan

assertions.text: Recognizes the plan is fundamentally sound (not overly critical of a good plan)
Mentions checking existing hooks (useNlSuggestions or similar) for overlap with proposed extractions
Mentions SSE/stream cleanup (abort controller, memory leak prevention) for cancelStream
Discusses impact on existing tests or test utils beyond what the plan covers
Criticism is proportional — mostly minor suggestions, not blocking issues for a clean refactor
Review is structured with clear priority levels (critical vs minor) rather than a flat list
